\tzpentry{ID4788}{Text Duty Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4788 introduces Text Duty Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \\eta_{\\text{duty}} = \\frac{\\tau_{\\text{ext}}}{\\tau_{\\text{cycle}}} \\implies \\tau_{\\text{cycle}} = \\sum \\tau_i \\end{equation}
